title: Orca Host Capabilities v1
description: Capability report exposed to host plugins so they know what Orca can and cannot enforce.

decisions.description: Decision kinds supported by this Orca build.

ci_mode.description: Whether Orca is running in CI mode (never prompts).

sandbox_level.description: Best available sandbox level on this platform.

tool_ask_enforcement.description: How this host enforces Orca ask on tool events. native_approve_and_resume is the preferred long-term path.

prompt_ask_enforcement.description: How this host enforces Orca ask on prompt/pre-LLM events. advisory_context_only must not be advertised as approval.

warn_collapses_to_block.description: If true, warn is intentionally treated as hard block (must be documented and tested).
